steps.title: Set up
steps.content: The product of $x$ and $(x - 7)$ equals $18$: $$x(x-7)=18 \implies x^2-7x-18=0$$

steps.title: Solve
steps.content: Factor: $(x-9)(x+2)=0$, so $x=9$ or $x=-2$. Since $x$ is positive, $x=9$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, compare the result from the work to the answer choices. The value, equation, or condition found above matches choice B, 9, and the other choices fail the same setup or substitution. Therefore B is correct.
